title: arenaria macrocarpa var. minutiflora
intro: Arenaria macrocarpa var. minutiflora, also known as the small-flowered arenaria, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been known to provide health benefits such as relief from respiratory issues, coughs, and colds, as well as reducing inflammation and fighting off bacterial infections. Arenaria macrocarpa var. minutiflora can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, and it has also been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
